zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Popham於大約1410年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Stephen Popham26歲，母親Margaret Rede16歲。她與Sir John Wadham III結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特易爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Popham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Hampshire, so called from an unattested short form of Old English popel ‘pebble’ + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

History: The Popham Colony was the first organized attempt to establish an English colony on the shores of what is now known as New England, then called Northern Virginia. George Popham of Hunstworth, Somerset, England, helped establish the colony at the mouth of the Kennebec River in 1607. It lasted for little over a year until it was abandoned in 1608. Although George died that same year, he may have had descendants or relatives with him as there are Pophams in the US who trace their family roots to the colony.

variants.name: Poplin
meanings: English: at least in part, a variant of   Popham  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Popham was born about 1410, in England, her father, Sir Stephen Popham, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Rede, was 16. She married Sir John Wadham III. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1476, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Ilton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Popham est née environ 1410, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Stephen Popham, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Rede, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Wadham III. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1476, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Ilton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Carisbrooke, Hampshire, England: Carisbrooke, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Popham um 1410 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Stephen Popham 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Rede 16. Sie hat Sir John Wadham III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1476 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ilton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1476, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Ilton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Popham(이)가 대략 1410년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Stephen Popham(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Rede(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Wadham III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Popham nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Stephen Popham, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Rede, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wadham III. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1476, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Ilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Carisbrooke, Hampshire, England: карисбрук, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Popham родилась около 1410 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Stephen Popham было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Rede, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wadham III. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1476 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности илтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1476, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Ilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
